prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `62b74c02`.
codex_response:
Implemented `62b74c02` as an ARC2 task package. The rule is: extract the left-edge nonzero block, repeat that same block on the far right, and fill the middle gap row-by-row with the leftmost color from each row. The summary hint matched the official examples, so I used it; no extra primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: official verifier `4/4`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, and the build produced the required artifacts. I couldn’t open the PNG previews with a terminal image renderer because none was installed, so I visually sanity-checked representative generated grids rendered directly from [`task.json`](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/62b74c02/task.json) instead; the sampled family stays on-distribution.
